diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Measurement Process

diagrams.title: System Performance Curve
diagrams.description: Graph showing relationship between workload and response time with saturation point marked
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how system performance degrades as load increases beyond capacity

diagrams.title: Workload Types Classification
diagrams.description: Diagram categorizing different workload types and their characteristics
elements: Batch Workload (high throughput, no user interaction)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different workload characteristics for proper capacity planning
